name: AU915 (915-928 MHz)
description: Australia ISM band. ChirpStack commonly runs sub-band 2 (channels 8-15) for an 8-channel gateway.
notes: Sub-band 2: 125 kHz channels 916.8-918.2 MHz (channels 8-15) plus the 500 kHz channel 917.5 MHz (SF8BW500). RX2 923.3 MHz SF12BW500 (DR8). Match the ChirpStack region and sub-band exactly.
